hero.description: The world's most advanced prediction market platform, where wisdom of the crowd meets institutional-grade technology.

mission.title: Our mission is to democratize data and unlock global foresight.
mission.description: We believe that prediction markets are the most efficient tools for information discovery. By incentivizing truth, we help the world see what's coming before it happens — from political shifts to technological breakthroughs.

hero.description: Your privacy is our absolute priority. Learn how we protect your data and ensure your anonymity.

protection.description: We use end-to-end encryption to ensure that all your transactions and personal data are protected against unauthorized access.

transparency.description: We believe in an open platform. You have full control over your data and can request deletion at any time.

collection.description: We only collect the information strictly necessary for the platform to function, such as email addresses and blockchain transaction data. We do not track your browsing outside the platform.

usage.description: Your data is used to process payments, resolve market disputes, and send important notifications about your positions and account security.

sharing.description: We will never sell your data. Sharing only occurs with essential service providers (such as payment gateways) or when required by law.

questions.description: Our security team is ready to help. Contact us through our official channel.

hero.description: By accessing the platform, you agree to the terms below. Please read all points of this agreement carefully.

legitimate.description: The platform must be used only for lawful prediction market purposes and community interaction. Any malicious use will result in immediate ban.

liability.description: The platform is not liable for financial losses resulting from incorrect market predictions or asset fluctuations.

eligibility.description: Use of the platform is restricted to persons 18 years of age or the legal age permitted in your country. It is your responsibility to verify whether the use of prediction markets is legal in your jurisdiction.

accounts.description: You are solely responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password. We recommend using two-factor authentication (2FA) for all access.

resolutions.description: Market resolutions are based on official data sources or decentralized oracles. Once resolved, the result is final and irreversible.

accept.description: By continuing to use our services, you confirm that you have read and agree to all the terms described above.

blog.subtitle: Expert analysis, market updates, and prediction strategies from our global research team.

step1.title: Choose a Market
step1.description: Browse hundreds of prediction markets across politics, sports, crypto, and more. Each market represents a real-world event with a clear resolution date.

step2.title: Make Your Prediction
step2.description: Buy YES or NO shares based on what you believe will happen. Prices reflect the crowd's estimated probability of each outcome.

step3.title: Track & Trade
step3.description: Watch your positions in real-time. You can sell your shares at any time before the market resolves to lock in profits or cut losses.

step4.title: Collect Winnings
step4.description: When the market resolves, winning shares pay out at full value. Your earnings are automatically credited to your account.

info.description: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help improve your experience by remembering preferences and enabling essential features.

security.title: Your Privacy is Protected
security.description: We use industry-standard security measures to protect all cookie data. No personal information is shared with third parties without your consent.

essential.name: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for basic site functionality such as login, navigation, and security. These cannot be disabled.

functional.name: Functional Cookies
functional.description: Enable personalized features like language preferences, region settings, and saved interface customizations.

analytics.name: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our site by collecting anonymous usage statistics.

marketing.name: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track the effectiveness of marketing campaigns.

details.local_storage: We use local storage to save your interface preferences, theme settings, and session data for a faster experience.
details.session_cookies: Session cookies are temporary and are deleted when you close your browser. They are used to maintain your login state.
details.analytics_cookies: Analytics cookies collect anonymous data about page views, navigation patterns, and feature usage to help us improve the platform.
details.third_party: Some cookies may be set by third-party services we use, such as payment processors and analytics providers.

rights.accept: You can accept or reject non-essential cookies at any time.
rights.reject: Rejecting cookies will not affect essential site functionality.
rights.withdraw: You can withdraw your consent at any time through cookie settings.
rights.settings: You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
rights.info: You have the right to request information about the cookies we use.

banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

settings.title: Cookie Preferences
settings.description: When you visit our website, we may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to.

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant ads on other sites.

feature1.title: Predict the Market
feature1.description: Analyze trends and make accurate predictions across various global markets.

feature2.title: Total Security
feature2.description: Your account and profits protected with the highest security technology.

feature3.title: Global Reach
feature3.description: Access markets worldwide, from sports to finance and crypto.

slide1.title: Predict. Trade. Win. Rewards
slide1.description: Experience a fun and rewarding way to trade in the share market — where every prediction counts and every trade matters.

slide2.title: Micro-shares, Opportunities
slide2.description: Turn your market predictions into profits. Trade fractional shares and compete with other users on the platform.
